title: Páginas de Stats Detalhadas: Preflop, Postflop, Posicional, Stack Depth
plan: 1. Update src/web/data.py: Add prepare_stats_data() function that enriches analytics data with preflop by-position breakdown with health badges, postflop by-street breakdown with health badges, positional radar chart SVG data, stack depth by-tier and cross-table position x tier data, and period filtering support

2. Update src/web/routes/cash.py: Add stats tab handling in sub_tab() to call prepare_stats_data() with period/from/to query params, add sub_tab query param for sub-tabs (preflop/postflop/posicional/stackdepth)
3. Update src/web/routes/tournament.py: Mirror the same stats tab handling as cash.py

4. Rewrite src/web/templates/cash/stats.html: Complete rebuild with sub-tabs (Preflop, Postflop, Posicional, Stack Depth), period filter bar, Preflop tab with VPIP/PFR/3Bet table by position with health badges + daily/weekly trends, Postflop tab with AF/AFq/CBet/WTSD/W$SD table by street + weekly trends, Posicional tab with inline SVG radar chart + full position table + blinds defense + ATS + most/least profitable comparison, Stack Depth tab with tier table + cross-table position x tier, all stats with health badge spans
5. Rewrite src/web/templates/tournament/stats.html: Same template structure as cash stats but with tournament title/context
6. Update src/web/static/css/style.css: Add CSS for stats sub-tabs, radar chart SVG styling, health badge colors (good/warning/danger), cross-table styling
7. Update src/web/static/js/app.js: Add JS for stats sub-tab switching (show/hide panels), period filter toggle, custom date filter
